title: bidens conjuncta
intro: Bidens conjuncta, also known as jointweed, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the aster family of plants. The medicinal properties of Bidens conjuncta lie in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce swelling, soothe pain, and promote the healing of damaged tissues. Bidens conjuncta can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, or infusions, which are used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
